name: Ubicom Holdings, Inc.
summary: Ubicom Holdings, Inc. engages in the development of software in Japan. The company is involved in the application and system development; embedded software, firmware, and drivers development for printers, input/output devices, storage devices, and mobile devices; and software testing business. It also provides medical information systems, such as Mighty checker, a reception inspection software; Mighty Cube, an ordering check software; and Mighty Trace System, a cell culture process support support system, as well as offers data analysis, system development, and consulting services. In addition, the company is involved in the AI application development, proof of concept development, and corpus creation support business; and provision of data analysis, visualization, extraction, conversion, loading, and cleansing services. Further, it engages in the test automation support service; test process automation design, construction, installation support; development and provision of automation tools; and test result analysis business. The company was formerly known as AWS Holdings, Inc. and changed its name to Ubicom Holdings, Inc. in July 2017. Ubicom Holdings, Inc. was founded in 2005 and is headquartered in Tokyo, Japan.
